title: Elementary Nether and End Ores
description: Dimensions get ore! Nether diamond ore, End Diamond ore, emerald lapis iron coal matching the endstone and netherrack textures
body:
This mod added Nether Gold ore before mojang added it.  In newer versions that is replaced by vanilla, but the lapis coal iron diamond emerald etc in the nether and the end is in full bloom 

A few hand picked ores brought to the nether and end 

Extra: 
- Also adds Ender ore in the end, used to get ender pearls
- Also adds Ghast ore in the nether, used to get ghast tears

Compatible with Resource Packs: if your pack changes the netherrack or endstone textures, this mod will overlay the ore icon on top of those textures.

Compatible with Silk touch, Fortune, Blast furnace.

Old versions of the mod uses the config system, newer 1.20+ use the mojang JSON data pack based features

[https://github.com/Lothrazar/ElementaryOres/blob/trunk/1.16/elementaryores.toml](https://github.com/Lothrazar/ElementaryOres/blob/trunk/1.16/elementaryores.toml "https://github.com/Lothrazar/ElementaryOres/blob/trunk/1.16/elementaryores.toml")
